content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 9 (O):

Atom 9 is oxygen (O), and it is covalently connected to:
- Atom 8 (C) - carbon
- Atom 10 (C) - carbon

The oxygen atom (O:9) forms two single bonds with carbon atoms (C:8 and C:10), which appears to be part of an ether functional group in the molecular structure.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file naming convention in the working directory, the molecule appears to be associated with geomconf_9540.xyz, so the geomconf_index is 9540.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 9 (O) are:
- Atom 8 (C)
- Atom 10 (C)

And the geomconf_index is 9540.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
